members.label: art
members.description: large rectangular painting above the buffet
members.long_form_open_description: A wide, framed horizontal artwork or print hung on the left wall above the buffet. Colors are dark blues and muted tones, appears to depict a night scene or abstract city/bridge; mounted at eye level, centered over the sideboard.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly above the wooden buffet on the left wall

members.label: art
members.description: large horizontal painting/print mounted on left wall above sideboard
members.long_form_open_description: A wide rectangular framed artwork depicting a night or twilight waterfront scene with reflections and small lights; dark blue and warm tones dominate. Hung centered above the sideboard approximately eye-height. Frame appears thin and dark.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Centered above the sideboard, left of the central table
